Extend Gitlab CI (#747)

* Split nightly jobs and other CI jobs into separate sets

* Rm file that can be referenced from repo and update tag

* Restructure tests
- Restructure gitlab directory
- Refactor script for more detailed gitlab logs

* Avoid creating index.lock by checking if checkout needs to occur
